title: Jack Henry Collaborates with Victor Technologies and MVB Bank to Offer Faster Payments Capabilities
text: MVB Bank  advances instant payments strategy becoming first Jack Henry Bank to launch RTP Send capabilities on The Clearing House's RTP® network MONETT, Mo. , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that Victor Technologies, Inc. ("Victor") is working with the company to advance its instant payments strategy.

title: 200 Financial Institutions Automate Financial Forecasting and Budgeting with Jack Henry
text: Budgeting and planning tool helps increase efficiencies, strengthen performance   MONETT, Mo. , July 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that more than 200 banks and credit unions are leveraging the company's financial performance capability to automate forecasting and financial reporting.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Boosts Clientele With LINKBANCORP Tie-Up
text: LINKBANCORP chooses Jack Henry (JKHY) to help the former provide advanced banking services to its commercial and retail customers.

title: LINKBANCORP, Inc. Collaborates with Jack Henry for Innovative Local Banking
text: New relationship will support bank's entrepreneurial, growth-oriented banking strategy MONETT, Mo. , July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that LINKBANCORP, Inc., the holding company of The Gratz Bank and LINKBANK, selected Jack Henry to bring modern banking services to its local community.
